name: duplicate
description: This issue or Pull Request already exists

name: help wanted
description: Extra attention is needed

name: Priority: Critical
description: P0: The most urgent, requiring immediate resolution, often stopping all other work.

name: Priority: High
description: P1: Urgent, essential, but not as critical as P0; affects customers but might have workarounds.

name: Priority: Medium
description: P2: Affects customers but with a non-technical workaround.

name: Priority: Low
description: P3: Doesn't directly impact customers or is less urgent.

name: Status: Abandoned
description: The issue or Pull Request is wontfix

name: Status: Blocked
description: Progress on the issue is Blocked

name: Status: In Progress
description: Work in Progress

name: Status: Proposal
description: Request for comments

name: Status: Review Needed
description: Request for review comments

name: Status: Need More Info
description: Lacks enough info to make progress

name: Status: Need to Fix or discussion
description: Need to Fix or discussion for Request for review comments

name: Status: Need to Estimate
description: Need to estimate for this fix or feature

name: Type: Breaking Change
description: Includes breaking changes

name: Type: Bug
description: Bug or Bug fixes

name: Type: Documentation
description: Documentation only changes

name: Type: Feature
description: New Feature

name: Type: Refactoring
description: A code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature

name: Type: Testing
description: Adding missing tests or correcting existing tests

name: Type: Maintenance
description: Repository Maintenance

name: Type: CI
description: Changes to CI configuration files and scripts

name: Type: Question
description: Further information is requested

name: Type: Security
description: Vulnerability disclosure or Fixing security issue

name: Type: Dependencies
description: Dependency issues or Changes to dependency files

name: Type: Release
description: Related to release process

name: Release: Major
description: Increment Major Version

name: Release: Minor
description: Increment Minor Version

name: Release: Patch
description: Increment Patch Version

name: Release: Skip Changelog
description: Skip for changelog with release
